input.prompt:
I'm migrating from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI. My existing code uses

MAUI? Also, can I reuse my ViewCell templates inside CollectionView?

I'm migrating from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI. My existing code uses

input.initialPrompt:
I'm migrating from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI. My existing code uses
ListView with ViewCell for each item. Should I keep using ListView in
MAUI? Also, can I reuse my ViewCell templates inside CollectionView?

data.content:
**ListView → CollectionView** is the recommended migration path in .NET MAUI. Here's why:

| | ListView | CollectionView |
|---|---|---|
| Virtualization | Limited | Built-in, performant |
| Layout | Vertical only | Vertical, horizontal, grid |
| Selection | Single | Single & multi |
| Headers/Footers | Yes | Yes |
| Cell wrapping | Requires `ViewCell` | Uses plain `DataTemplate` |

**Key point: No, you cannot use `ViewCell` inside `CollectionView`.** `CollectionView` uses `DataTemplate` directly — no cell wrapper needed. You'll need to extract the inner content of your `ViewCell` into a `DataTemplate`.

**Migration example:**

```xml
<!-- Before (ListView + ViewCell) -->
<ListView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}">
  <ListView.ItemTemplate>
    <DataTemplate>
      <ViewCell>
        <StackLayout>
          <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
        </StackLayout>
      </ViewCell>
    </DataTemplate>
  </ListView.ItemTemplate>
</ListView>

<!-- After (CollectionView) -->
<CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}">
  <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    <DataTemplate>
      <StackLayout>
        <Label Text="{Binding Name}" />
      </StackLayout>
    </DataTemplate>
  </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
</CollectionView>
```

**TL;DR:** Switch to `CollectionView`, strip the `ViewCell` wrapper, and keep the inner layout as your `DataTemplate` content. You'll get better performance and more layout flexibility.
data.reasoningText: The user is asking about migrating from Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI, specifically about ListView vs CollectionView and whether ViewCell templates can be reused inside CollectionView. This is a knowledge question, not a code task. Let me answer directly.
